name: Still Sukhumvit 20
highlight:
STILL Sukhumvit 20
A Private Luxury Residence in the Heart of Phrom Phong
Introducing STILL 20, a refined luxury residential development designed for those who value privacy, space, and understated elegance. Located in the prime Sukhumvit 20 neighborhood, just moments from Phrom Phong, this project offers a rare balance between urban convenience and serene living.
STILL 20 is a low-density luxury condominium with a limited number of residences, ensuring exclusivity and tranquility. Each unit is thoughtfully planned with generous layouts, high ceilings, and refined materials, creating a living environment that feels calm, timeless, and deeply residential.
The project reflects the concept of Quiet Luxury—where design is intentional, details are precise, and quality speaks without excess. Ideal for both end-users seeking a long-term home and investors looking for a rare freehold asset in one of Bangkok’s most established residential districts.
Key Highlights
• Prime Sukhumvit 20 location, near BTS Phrom Phong
• Low-density project with high privacy
• Spacious layouts suitable for family living
• Timeless architecture and refined interiors
• Strong long-term value in a high-demand residential area
features: Foyer of The House,Living Room,Concervatory Room,
Fayrer of the house,Pet Yard and Collector’s Garden
Health Club in Residence Poolside Lounge,Home Gym,
Private Lift wth a single loaded corridor,One sevice lift,
and Prime location near BTS Asoke and PhromPhong

name: InterContinental Residences Bangkok Asoke
highlight:
InterContinental Residences Bangkok Asoke
An ultra-luxury residential development in the heart of Asoke–Sukhumvit,
distinguished by its prime location near BTS Asok and MRT Sukhumvit. 
As the first freehold InterContinental Branded Residences in Bangkok,
the project offers only 88 exclusive units, ensuring exceptional privacy.
Designed with refined elegance and supported by five-star hotel-level 
amenities and 24-hour concierge services, it perfectly caters to both 
+refined urban living and long-term investment.
features: 25 Meter Pool,Hot and Cool Plunge Pool,Fitness,

name: Eighteen Seven (187)

Eighteenseven Super Luxury Residences at One Bangkok

and features expansive landscaped communal gardens with comprehensive
amenities.

Designed to offer exceptional privacy amid the vibrancy of urban life,
the project seamlessly connects to the Luxury Zone of One Bangkok,
providing effortless access to an elevated lifestyle at the heart of the city.

name: Nimit Langsuan
highlight:
NIMIT Langsuan
A Rare Freehold Residence in the Heart of Langsuan
Introducing NIMIT Langsuan, a super-luxury freehold condominium located on Langsuan Road, one of Bangkok’s most prestigious and tightly held residential enclaves. This address sits at the intersection of nature, culture, and the city’s most refined lifestyle—just moments from Lumphini Park, Ploenchit, and the CBD.
NIMIT Langsuan is designed around the philosophy of timeless elegance and absolute privacy. With a limited number of residences, the project offers an intimate living environment where space, light, and craftsmanship are given true priority. Each residence features generous layouts, refined proportions, and premium materials curated for long-term living rather than short-term trends.
The architecture reflects understated sophistication, blending seamlessly with the character of Langsuan—quiet, green, and enduringly valuable. This is a residence created for discerning homeowners and investors who understand the rarity of freehold ownership in a prime low-supply location.
Key Highlights
Prime Langsuan Road location, near Lumphini Park
Freehold ownership in a highly restricted residential zone
Low-density project with high privacy
Spacious layouts suitable for real living
Strong long-term value in one of Bangkok’s most established luxury districts
features: Access Card Control and Car Park

education: Mahaprutaram Girls' School under the Royal Patronage of her Majesty the Queen

name: Upper House Residences Bangkok
highlight:
Both projects are ultra-luxury freehold residences, located on one of the last remaining prime plots on Wireless Road, a location long regarded as one of Bangkok’s most prestigious and tightly held addresses.
The developments comprise two iconic towers rising 52 and 71 storeys, with a total of 395 exclusive residences. At over 280 metres in height, the towers will offer uninterrupted panoramic views of Lumphini Park and Benjakitti Park, redefining vertical luxury living in the city.
Construction of the superstructure has now officially commenced, with the first phase scheduled for completion from 2029 onward.
The projects are operated under Upper House, a globally renowned hospitality brand, and represent the first Upper House Branded Residences in Southeast Asia, setting a new benchmark for branded residential living in the region.
Design excellence is led by an internationally acclaimed team:
Architecture by Foster + Partners, landscape design by PLandscape, interiors by BAR Studio and PIA Interior, and a holistic wellness concept by GOCO, seamlessly integrating luxury, wellbeing, and contemporary living.

Together, these elements position Upper House as a rare, future-defining residential address on Wireless Road—where global design, hospitality, and ultra-luxury living converge.

parks: The Royal Bangkok Sprot Club (2.2 km)
Bangkok Art and Culture Center (3.3 km)

highlight:
Mavista is an All-Penthouse Residences project.
Each unit occupies an entire floor and features 5 bedrooms, a private, fully

The project is constructed by Si Phaya Construction, a contractor renowned
for delivering predominantly luxury-segment developments, reflecting 
the project’s premium standards and quality.

name: Scope Langsuan
highlight:
A Super Luxury condominium situated in Thailand’s most prestigious 
and expensive prime area, distinguished by world-class architectural design 
and private lift access.

The project offers a full range of premium amenities and is surrounded 
by lush greenery, featuring a dog park, pet care facilities, and a study room,
thoughtfully designed to support an elevated urban lifestyle.

name: Scope Thonglor
highlight:
Designed by Thomas Juul-Hansen, the renowned Danish designer, 
the project places a strong emphasis on privacy, 
featuring only 18 exclusive units.

It incorporates double-glazed insulated Low-E glass with an air gap,
effectively reducing heat, minimizing glare from sunlight, 
and filtering external noise for superior living comfort.
features: Dedicated Executive Chef for Residents and Enjoy personalized,
made-to-order dining by an on-site chef, professional doorman
and porter services for seamless arrival assistance,
and exclusive valet parking with automated parking facilities.

name: Langsuan Residence
highlight:
Langsuan Residence is located on Langsuan Road and is a residential
condominium situated in a prime business district at the heart of Bangkok.
The project is surrounded by embassies and offers excellent transportation 
connectivity.

name: Narasiri Victoire
highlight:
The iconic “Apollo Fountain” inspired by the Sun God, draws its design influence from the Palace of Versailles. This grandeur is expressed through a monumental 140-meter-wide main gate arch and a landscape that feels as though France has been brought here in its entirety.
The common areas are lavishly designed, from the grand entrance to expansive garden spaces spanning over 8,000 sq.m.

name: Narinsiri Krungthep Kreetha
highlight:
Narasiri Rama 9 - Krungthep Kreetha is a two-storey single detached housing project designed in the Georgian Revival style,reflecting the elegance of a classical golden era.
The architecture follows the principles of the Golden Ratio and symmetrical design, achieving perfect balance and harmony in every detail.
Homes are planned with an open plan layout and grand spaces,ensuring excellent ventilation and abundant natural light throughout both floors.
